goal: complex_real_smul(r + s, x) = complex_real_smul(r, x) + complex_real_smul(s, x)

proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1 + x2, x3) = x0(x1, x3) + x0(x2, x3) } = module_smul_add_left_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, k1) + complex_real_smul(k0, k1) != complex_real_smul(w0 + k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, k2) + complex_real_smul(w1, k2) != complex_real_smul(w0 + w1, k2) } }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w2) + complex_real_smul(w1, w2) != complex_real_smul(w0 + w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, k3) + complex_real_smul(w3, k3) != complex_real_smul(w0 + w3, k3) } }
let w4: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w4) + complex_real_smul(w3, w4) != complex_real_smul(w0 + w3, w4) }
let w5: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w5) + complex_real_smul(w3, w5) != complex_real_smul(w0 + w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Complex, x2: Real) { complex_real_smul(x0, x1) + complex_real_smul(x2, x1) = complex_real_smul(x0 + x2, x1) }(w0, w5, w3)

goal: complex_real_smul(r, x + y) = complex_real_smul(r, x) + complex_real_smul(r, y)

proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x2 + x3) = x0(x1, x2) + x0(x1, x3) } = module_smul_add_right_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, k0 + k1) != complex_real_smul(w0, k0) + complex_real_smul(w0, k1) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, w1 + k2) != complex_real_smul(w0, w1) + complex_real_smul(w0, k2) } }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w1) + complex_real_smul(w0, w2) != complex_real_smul(w0, w1 + w2) }
let w3: Complex satisfy { exists(k3: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, w3 + k3) != complex_real_smul(w0, w3) + complex_real_smul(w0, k3) } }
let w4: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w3) + complex_real_smul(w0, w4) != complex_real_smul(w0, w3 + w4) }
let w5: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0, w3) + complex_real_smul(w0, w5) != complex_real_smul(w0, w3 + w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Complex, x2: Complex) { complex_real_smul(x0, x1) + complex_real_smul(x0, x2) = complex_real_smul(x0, x1 + x2) }(w0, w3, w5)

goal: complex_real_smul(r * s, x) = complex_real_smul(r, complex_real_smul(s, x))

proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = module_smul_assoc_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(k0, k1)) != complex_real_smul(w0 * k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(w1, k2)) != complex_real_smul(w0 * w1, k2) } }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0 * w1, w2) != complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(w1, w2)) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Complex) { complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(w3, k3)) != complex_real_smul(w0 * w3, k3) } }
let w4: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0 * w3, w4) != complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(w3, w4)) }
let w5: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(w0 * w3, w5) != complex_real_smul(w0, complex_real_smul(w3, w5)) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Complex) { complex_real_smul(x0 * x1, x2) = complex_real_smul(x0, complex_real_smul(x1, x2)) }(w0, w3, w5)

function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.1, x1) = x1 } = module_smul_one_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[Complex, Real](complex_real_smul)
let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_real_smul(Real.1, w0) != w0 }
function(x0: Complex) { complex_real_smul(Real.1, x0) = x0 }(w0)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { (module_smul_add_left_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and module_smul_add_right_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and module_smul_assoc_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and module_smul_one_constraint[T0, T1](x0)) = is_module_action[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul)

goal: exists(k0: Module[Real, Complex]) { Module.new[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { not Module.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: Module[T0, T1]) { Module.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[Module[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Real, Complex](complex_real_smul)
let w0: Real satisfy { complex_real_module.smul(w0) != complex_real_smul(w0) }
let w1: Complex satisfy { complex_real_module.smul(w0, w1) != complex_real_smul(w0, w1) }

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: (T0, T1) -> T1, x2: T0, x3: T1) { Option.some[Module[T0, T1]](x0) != Module.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.smul(x2, x3) = x1(x2, x3) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_module, complex_real_smul, w0, w1)
